name: RETAINED FETAL LUNG FLUID
definition: NEONATAL WET LUNG DISEASE = TRANSIENT RESPIRATORY DISTRESS OF THE NEWBORN =

demographics.Frequency: 6%; most common cause of respiratory distress in newborn

distribution: linear opacities + perivascular haze + thickened fissures + interlobular septal thickening
discriminating_features: linear opacities + perivascular haze + thickened fissures + interlobular septal thickening

general: linear opacities + perivascular haze + thickened fissures + interlobular septal thickening
